LanguageData.RimAudio_RainSound.stages.0.label: 安宁雨声
LanguageData.RimAudio_RainSound.stages.0.description: The soft rhythm of rain settles the nerves.
LanguageData.RimAudio_ThunderSound.stages.0.label: rolling thunder
LanguageData.RimAudio_ThunderSound.stages.0.descripti: The sky is loud and unstable.
LanguageData.RimAudio_ToxicWind.stages.0.label: harsh toxic wind
LanguageData.RimAudio_ToxicWind.stages.0.description: The outside air hisses with a sickening chemical edge.
LanguageData.RimAudio_AshWind.stages.0.label: dry ashfall hush
LanguageData.RimAudio_AshWind.stages.0.description: The world sounds muted under drifting ash.
LanguageData.RimAudio_CampfireCrackle.stages.0.label: campfire crackle
LanguageData.RimAudio_CampfireCrackle.stages.0.descri: The crackling of a nearby fire feels warm and familiar.
LanguageData.RimAudio_FireCrackle.stages.0.label: uncontrolled fire
LanguageData.RimAudio_FireCrackle.stages.0.descriptio: A nearby blaze snaps and roars in a way that feels dangerous.
LanguageData.RimAudio_GeneratorHum.stages.0.label: generator hum
LanguageData.RimAudio_GeneratorHum.stages.0.descripti: A machine drones nearby without pause.
LanguageData.RimAudio_RiverWater.stages.0.label: running water
LanguageData.RimAudio_RiverWater.stages.0.description: Nearby flowing water adds a steady natural backdrop.
LanguageData.RimAudio_OceanWaves.stages.0.label: ocean surf
LanguageData.RimAudio_OceanWaves.stages.0.description: Rolling surf can be heard nearby.
LanguageData.RimAudio_TelevisionNoise.stages.0.label: television chatter
LanguageData.RimAudio_TelevisionNoise.stages.0.descri: Broadcast voices and music spill through the room.
LanguageData.RimAudio_LeisureNoise.stages.0.label: playroom noise
LanguageData.RimAudio_LeisureNoise.stages.0.descripti: Nearby recreation spaces make the room feel lived in.
LanguageData.RimAudio_CoolerHum.stages.0.label: cooler hum
LanguageData.RimAudio_AnimalNoise.stages.0.label: animal sounds
LanguageData.RimAudio_AnimalNoise.stages.0.descriptio: Nearby animals rustle, breathe, and vocalize.
LanguageData.RimAudio_Birdsong.stages.0.label: birdsong
LanguageData.RimAudio_Birdsong.stages.0.description: Short calls and chirps drift in from nearby birds.
LanguageData.RimAudio_WildlifeNoise.stages.0.label: wildlife nearby
LanguageData.RimAudio_WildlifeNoise.stages.0.descript: Unfamiliar animal sounds carry in from the wild.
LanguageData.RimAudio_PredatorNoise.stages.0.label: predator sounds
LanguageData.RimAudio_PredatorNoise.stages.0.descript: Heavy movement and threatening calls suggest a predator nearby.
LanguageData.RimAudio_PetNoise.stages.0.label: pet sounds
LanguageData.RimAudio_PetNoise.stages.0.description: Familiar animal noises make the area feel domestic.
LanguageData.RimAudio_MechNoise.stages.0.label: mechanical servos
LanguageData.RimAudio_MechNoise.stages.0.description: Metallic whirs and actuator clicks echo nearby.
LanguageData.RimAudio_TreeRustle.stages.0.label: trees rustling
LanguageData.RimAudio_TreeRustle.stages.0.description: Leaves and branches shift softly in the wind.
LanguageData.RimAudio_CrowdNoise.stages.0.label: crowd murmur
LanguageData.RimAudio_CrowdNoise.stages.0.description: Many nearby voices and footsteps blend into a constant background murmur.
LanguageData.RimAudio_BabyRoomNoise.stages.0.label: nursery ambience
LanguageData.RimAudio_BabyRoomNoise.stages.0.descript: Soft domestic sounds from baby furniture make the area feel comforting.
LanguageData.RimAudio_ParentVoice.stages.0.label: familiar parent voice
LanguageData.RimAudio_ParentVoice.stages.0.descriptio: A familiar parent is close enough to hear.
LanguageData.RimAudio_WoundedEnemy.stages.0.label: enemy pain nearby
LanguageData.RimAudio_WoundedEnemy.stages.0.descripti: Hostile cries and labored movement carry across the area.
LanguageData.RimAudio_CombatNoise.stages.0.label: combat noise
LanguageData.RimAudio_CombatNoise.stages.0.descriptio: Violence nearby keeps the nerves on edge.
